items.title: US sanctions Rwanda's military and top commanders over fighting in DR Congo
items.dek: Rwanda accused Washington's move as “one sided” and politically motivated.
items.body: Rwanda accused Washington's move as “one sided” and politically motivated.

items.title: Six US soldiers killed in Iranian strike on Kuwait base
items.dek: The US defence secretary confirms a US military base was hit by an Iranian missile on Sunday.
items.body: The US defence secretary confirms a US military base was hit by an Iranian missile on Sunday.

items.title: Oil and gas prices rise on new Iran threat to Gulf shipping
items.dek: Iranian official threatens to "set fire" to any ships passing through the crucial Strait of Hormuz.
items.body: Iranian official threatens to "set fire" to any ships passing through the crucial Strait of Hormuz.
